summary: Iteration 88: Complete testing of document versioning feature in 'Documentazione Aziendale' module at /sistema-qualita. All 15 test features verified successfully including Rev. column display, version history dialog, revision upload with automatic archiving, version downloads, category filter, search, new document upload as v1, and delete with all versions removed.
critical_code_review_comments: All versioning data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Version badge shows v{n} with history icon for multi-version documents
History dialog correctly shows all versions sorted by version number (current first)
Revision upload dialog clearly indicates current version will be archived automatically
Delete dialog mentions removing all revisions when applicable
Backend properly handles documents without version field (defaults to v1)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test documents during revision upload and new document upload testing. Cleaned up TEST_ prefixed documents after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document versioning is fully functional. Key data-testids: btn-version-{doc_id} (version badge, clickable for multi-version docs), btn-revision-{doc_id} (revision upload button), history-dialog (version history modal), revision-dialog (revision upload modal), btn-dl-v{num} (download specific version), btn-confirm-revision. The document 'Manuale Qualita EN 1090 Rev A' has v3 with 3 versions. Template Rapporto Non Conformita now has v2. Backend endpoints: POST /{doc_id}/revision (multipart), GET /{doc_id}/versions, GET /{doc_id}/versions/{num}/download.

features_verified.page_load_with_rev_column: PASS - /sistema-qualita loads with Rev. column in table header
features_verified.v3_badge_display: PASS - 'Manuale Qualita EN 1090 Rev A' shows v3 with history icon
features_verified.v1_badge_display: PASS - Other documents show v1 without history icon
features_verified.version_history_dialog_open: PASS - Clicking v3 badge opens 'Storico Revisioni' dialog
features_verified.history_shows_all_versions: PASS - Dialog shows v3 (corrente), v2, v1 with download buttons
features_verified.download_v1_from_history: PASS - Download v1 (manuale_v1.txt) from history dialog works
features_verified.download_v2_from_history: PASS - Download v2 (manuale_v2.txt) from history dialog works
features_verified.revision_dialog_open: PASS - Clicking RefreshCw button opens 'Nuova Revisione' dialog
features_verified.revision_dialog_content: PASS - Shows document title and archiving message
features_verified.revision_upload_increments_version: PASS - Uploading revision to v1 doc creates v2 with history icon
features_verified.category_filter: PASS - Filtering by 'Manuali Qualita' shows 3 documents
features_verified.new_document_upload: PASS - New document appears as v1
features_verified.delete_removes_document: PASS - Document removed from table with success toast
features_verified.backend_versioning_tests: PASS - 12/12 pytest tests passed for versioning endpoints

tests: Version badge display (v3 with icon, v1 without)
Revision upload dialog content and functionality
